title: UUID() wrong evaluation.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testUUID (ID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, new_ID VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, new_ID2 VARCHAR(100), new_ID3 BINARY(16) UNIQUE);
UPDATE testUUID SET new_ID = UUID(), new_ID2 = REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), new_ID3 = UNHEX(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', '')) WHERE ID < 3;
key_bug_features: UUID() evaluation depends on character set and collation
